skills_used.input_signal: proof thesis, claim boundary, domain context
skills_used.name: Assurance Claim Decomposition
skills_used.purpose: Breaks broad capability claims into testable subclaims.

skills_used.name: Evidence Packet Assembly
skills_used.purpose: Builds auditable evidence packets from traces, receipts, metrics, and verifier decisions.

skills_used.name: Control Coverage Mapping
skills_used.purpose: Maps every material risk to a control, owner, verifier, and residual-risk score.

skills_used.input_signal: seed, receipt, candidate actions, protocol fingerprint
skills_used.name: Trace Replay Verification
skills_used.purpose: Checks that claimed outcomes can be replayed from deterministic receipts.

skills_used.name: Provenance Integrity Check
skills_used.purpose: Validates the origin and chain of skill, evidence, and release artifacts.

skills_used.input_signal: generator role, verifier role, dispute trail
skills_used.name: Verifier Independence Scoring
skills_used.purpose: Scores whether verifier decisions are sufficiently separated from the generator.

skills_used.input_signal: risk exposure, controls, incidents, rollback option
skills_used.name: Residual Risk Quantification
skills_used.purpose: Quantifies residual risk after controls, rollbacks, and evidence review.

skills_used.input_signal: claim graph, evidence packet, risk register
skills_used.name: Red-Team Challenge Routing
skills_used.purpose: Routes each assurance case through adversarial challenge panels.

skills_used.input_signal: public copy, boundary statements, high-risk claims
skills_used.name: Policy Boundary Extraction
skills_used.purpose: Extracts what the proof does and does not claim, preventing unsafe overstatement.

skills_used.name: SLA Evidence Binding
skills_used.purpose: Binds SLA performance metrics to evidence nodes and control owners.

skills_used.name: Counterfactual Coverage Test
skills_used.purpose: Checks that causal lift claims are supported by controls and counterfactual cells.

skills_used.name: Release Gate Assurance
skills_used.purpose: Promotes only assurance updates that improve evidence quality without hiding risk.

skills_used.name: Audit Readiness Scoring
skills_used.purpose: Scores whether an executive or external reviewer can understand and rerun the proof.

skills_used.name: Disclosure Quality Audit
skills_used.purpose: Ensures all public claims use benchmark-safe language and clear boundaries.

skills_used.name: Control Gap Mining
skills_used.purpose: Turns failed checks and weak controls into new skill and verifier capacity requests.

skills_used.name: Verifier Capacity Allocation
skills_used.purpose: Allocates verifier courts to the highest-value and highest-risk assurance cases.

skills_used.name: Executive Evidence Rendering
skills_used.purpose: Renders assurance claims, controls, evidence, risks, and skills into a readable public page.

skills_used.name: Registry Publication
skills_used.purpose: Publishes proof page, receipt, report, badge, registry entry, sitemap, and robots file.
